---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a tool, an extension, or a capability for Loophole
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do in Live that Loophole does not help with yet? Describe the workflow, not just the feature.

## Proposed solution

What would the tool or extension do? If it is a Bridge tool, sketch the inputs and the result you would expect.

## Which SDK capability does this need

Loophole can only do what the Ableton Extensions SDK exposes, and the SDK is v1.0.0-beta with documented gaps (no real-time audio, built-in devices only for insert, no automation/CC/clip-gain/routing API, user-invoked only). If you know the API surface this needs, name it. If you are not sure, describe the Live behavior and we will check feasibility.

## Prior art

Does another tool (a Kit extension, another MCP server, a Max for Live device) already do this? A link helps us decide whether to build it or point you at it.

## Environment (if relevant)

- **Ableton Live build:**
- **Which part:** Bridge / Kit extension / new idea
